hero.subtitle: Building efficient systems, optimizing performance, and solving complex problems.

about.title: profile
about.description1: I am a Full Stack developer with a strong focus on the backend, specialized in creating efficient, optimized, and scalable systems.
about.description2: I adapt easily to any part of the stack, from backend to frontend, and I feel comfortable facing new technical challenges. I enjoy automating processes, improving application performance, and finding solutions to complex problems.
about.description3: Much of my experience comes from developing systems for demanding environments like Minecraft, where I have worked with asynchronous programming, databases, and single-threaded optimization.
about.description4: My goal is to keep growing as a developer, constantly learning and building increasingly robust solutions.
about.card_backend_desc: Design of robust and efficient systems for high-demand environments.
about.card_performance_desc: Single-thread optimization and advanced asynchrony management.
about.card_fullstack_desc: Ability to integrate end-to-end smoothly across the entire stack.

formation.title: education
formation.description: Evolving from systems basics to advanced areas such as video games and cybersecurity.

explanations.smr: Training centered on hardware architecture, equipment assembly, local networks, internet services, and low-level operating systems.
explanations.dam: Intensive specialization focused on creating robust applications, object-oriented programming (Java, C#), and comprehensive database management.
explanations.videogames: Deep focus on interactive development, real-time asynchronous logic using graphics engines (Unity), and designing efficient software architectures.
explanations.cybersecurity: Advanced study of network security, ethical hacking, hardening of critical systems, and in-depth analysis of web and infrastructure vulnerabilities.

workExperience.title: experience
workExperience.description: Places where I have developed my professional skills and internships.

air_institute.description: Participation in the development of simulations and interactive projects using the Unity engine. Implementation of structural logic and resolution of technical challenges within the development environment.

heltica.description: Direct IT technical support. Specialized in hardware diagnostics and repair, replacement of components such as hard drives and memory, equipment assembly, and installation and configuration of Windows operating systems and various software for end-users.

descriptions.HTML: Markup language for structuring web pages.

descriptions.JavaScript: Programming language that enables interaction on the web.
descriptions.TypeScript: Superset of JavaScript that adds static typing.
descriptions.React: Library for building interactive user interfaces.
descriptions.TailwindCSS: CSS framework for fast styling with utility classes.
descriptions.Node_js: JavaScript runtime environment outside the browser.
descriptions.Redis: In-memory storage for fast and temporary data.
descriptions.Spring Boot: Java framework for building web applications quickly.
descriptions.C#: Microsoft's programming language, used in applications and video games.
descriptions.Docker: Platform to create and manage application containers.
descriptions.NPM: Package manager for JavaScript and Node.js.
descriptions.Minecraft: Open-world construction and exploration video game.
descriptions.Minecraft API: Tools to interact programmatically with Minecraft.
descriptions.IT Support: Technical assistance and maintenance of computer systems.

experience.title: technical
experience.description: I have developed multiple Minecraft mods (especially with Cobblemon):
bullets: Leverage asynchronous programming to reduce main-thread load
Optimize performance in single-threaded environments like Minecraft
experience.approach: I regularly work with asynchronous programming and efficient system design.
